name: sop-creator
description: Create runbooks, playbooks, and technical documentation that people actually follow — scannable, actionable, specific, testable, and maintained.

interface.shortDescription: Create runbooks, playbooks, and technical documentation that people actually follow — scannable, actionable, specific, testable, and maintained.
interface.longDescription: Use when documenting a repeatable technical or operational process — runbooks for incidents and on-call, deployment playbooks, troubleshooting guides, process SOPs, checklists, decision trees, and onboarding guides. Ships reference templates for each format plus writing rules that keep docs scannable and unambiguous: action-first numbered steps, exact names and thresholds instead of 'as needed', and a Definition of Done checklist near the top.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use SOP & Runbook Creator safely.
